abilities.name: Light Bending
abilities.narrationHints: Curving light around objects or people — partial invisibility, mirages, redirected beams. The edges shimmer like heat haze.
abilities.description: Bend light around yourself or objects — concealment, mirage, or redirection.
abilities.notFor: Affecting anything physical (bent light stops no arrow); working in total darkness (it needs light to bend); undoing what someone already saw.

tree.name: Haze Veil
tree.grants: Blur yourself into a heat-shimmer while still — effectively unseen beyond 10 paces; dim or brighten a small room's light; throw a fist-sized false glint.
tree.cannot: Movement breaks it above a slow creep; your shadow stays true; touch reveals everything.

tree.name: Drawn Curtain
tree.grants: Move at walking pace veiled; cloak one companion standing close; project a simple still image (a closed door, an empty shelf) over reality for minutes.
tree.cannot: Images don't survive scrutiny from arm's length; fails under Harmonic sound-sight (echo senses ignore it).

tree.name: Second Sun
tree.grants: Full mirage-craft: a moving figure, a wall that isn't there, daylight in a cellar; split your image into three. And a soundless flash that blinds a group for a breath — while it lasts they cannot aim, cannot follow a movement, and every act that needs their eyes is badly weakened until the glare clears.
tree.cannot: Bent light still stops no arrow. The flash takes friend and foe alike unless they knew to look away, and a Prism-Sight adept reads the bend coming. Blinding is a breath, not a scene — plan what you do with it before you spend it.

abilities.name: Prism Sight
abilities.narrationHints: Splitting light into revealing spectra — seeing heat traces, hidden markings, tampering, recent presence, and through glamours.
abilities.description: See the hidden spectra — heat traces, concealed marks, tampering, and lies of light.
abilities.notFor: Seeing through solid barriers (it reads light, not matter); reading thoughts; working with eyes closed or in absolute darkness.

tree.name: True Spectrum
tree.grants: See heat traces (a hand's warmth on a handle, a body's passage within minutes); spot tampering, overpainting, recent digging; notice light-bending at work.
tree.cannot: Traces fade in minutes to hours; rain and cold erase them; cannot identify WHO, only THAT.

tree.name: Layered Reading
tree.grants: Read a scene's last hour of light-history in still places; see through rank-1 veils and mirages; catch the micro-flush of a lie on a face in good light.
tree.cannot: Lie-reading is a hint, not proof (one reroll of a social sense, not a truth machine); crowded scenes smear.

tree.name: The Light Beneath
tree.grants: See the structural light of things: stress lines in a bridge, sickness in a body, active nanite flows, the seams of Precursor work; pierce any mirage of lower rank instantly.
tree.cannot: Minutes of use cost hours of eye-ache; what you see you cannot always name; some Precursor light looks back.

abilities.name: Radiant Lance
abilities.narrationHints: A coherent beam of focused light — silent, precise, instantaneous. Leaves clean scorch lines.
abilities.description: Focus light into a searing coherent beam — precise, silent, fast as sight.
abilities.notFor: Subtlety (the line of light is visible to everyone); nonlethal crowd control; cutting what light cannot heat (mirror-finish, running water).

tree.name: Needle Beam
tree.grants: A precise burn at 20 paces: sever a rope, scorch a hand into dropping a weapon, light tinder instantly, mark a surface permanently.
tree.cannot: Cannot penetrate armor or thick wood; one heartbeat of beam per breath; useless in smoke or fog.

tree.name: Cutting Line
tree.grants: Sustained cut: through a door bar, a cart axle, light armor at close range; deflect off a carried mirror to strike around a corner (with a wits check).
tree.cannot: Sustained cutting anchors you in place; the beam-line advertises your exact position; still fog-blind.

tree.name: Sunlance
tree.grants: A single devastating coherent strike — through a stone wall's weak point, a Harmonic shield's first rank, an engine block; can be flared wide as a blinding nonlethal burst instead.
tree.cannot: The line of light is visible to everyone, always — there is no quiet way to do this. Mirror-finish and running water still defeat it. And at full focus it is a killing tool: a Sunlance put through a person is not a wound, and the Blazeborn who carry it are taught to flare it wide before they are taught to narrow it.

abilities.name: Daybreak Mantle
abilities.narrationHints: A soft radiance that gathers on the shoulders and face — commanding attention, lending hope and authority to the bearer.
abilities.description: Gather a mantle of soft radiance that inspires the hopeless and commands a room.
abilities.notFor: Stealth of any kind (you are literally glowing); coercion; hiding your identity (the mantle is memorable).

tree.name: Kindled Presence
tree.grants: A warm radiance that marks you as someone to hear out — first words always get listened to; lift the mood of a dim room; steady the hopeless for an hour.
tree.cannot: Attention is not agreement; draws every eye including hostile ones.

tree.name: Rallying Light
tree.grants: Extend courage to companions in sight — one reroll against fear or despair for the group per scene; your requests to strangers land as if from a respected local.
tree.cannot: Strangers' goodwill is shallow — one favor deep; wears off and they wonder why they agreed.

tree.name: Standard of Dawn
tree.grants: Become a beacon a crowd will follow through danger — organize a panicked evacuation, hold a line of frightened volunteers, make a mob hesitate before violence.
tree.cannot: Leadership, not control — where you lead them matters; afterward you are the most identifiable person in the valley.

abilities.name: Light Well
abilities.narrationHints: Daylight coaxed into glass, water, or crystal — carried like a coal from an older fire.
abilities.description: Store light in a simple vessel and release it later, slow or sudden.
abilities.notFor: Weaponized flashes beyond a candle-flare (that is lance-work); storing MOONLIGHT or firelight (only true daylight keeps); vessels that are alive.

tree.name: Carried Coal
tree.grants: A jar of noon holds a lantern's worth through one night; release it steady or all at once as a soft flare.
tree.cannot: Keeps one night only; leaks visibly (a glowing pack is a beacon); one vessel at a time.

tree.name: Banked Noon
tree.grants: Three vessels, three nights' keeping; tune release warm or cold, wide or narrow. A sudden release startles a beast off its line or slows a pursuer to a stumble — enough to weaken a charge or buy the heartbeat you needed.
tree.cannot: Nothing brighter than the day you banked; cloudy-day light is thin gruel.

tree.name: Bottled Summer
tree.grants: A season's-worth cache for a cellar or sickroom — banked noon released steady over days measurably speeds a mending body; a release timed to a set moment (dawn in a windowless cell); light shaped to hold a doorway as a soft ward.
tree.cannot: The great cache takes a week of clear noons to fill; broken early, it is simply GONE — light does not forgive vessels.

abilities.name: Sun Coax
abilities.narrationHints: Bending a patch of sun to sit where it's needed — on a seedbed, a fever-chilled back, a wet rope.
abilities.description: Concentrate gentle sunlight: warm, dry, ripen, comfort.
abilities.notFor: Burning or blinding anything; forcing growth a plant cannot pay for; working at night without a Light Well to draw on.

tree.name: Warm Patch
tree.grants: Dry soaked gear in an hour; keep a chilled person safely warm; give a struggling seedbed a golden afternoon.
tree.cannot: One small patch; you must stay with it; it is exactly as visible as sunlight.

tree.name: Kind Season
tree.grants: Ripen a bed of greens days early; hold frost off a plot through one hard night; ease an ague's chill from a whole sickbed row — concentrated warmth worked into a body genuinely mends it, slower than a physic but asking nothing of the patient.
tree.cannot: The plants' debt is real — an early crop is a smaller one unless the soil is fed; a night's frost-holding is a night you don't sleep.

tree.name: Harvest-Hand
tree.grants: Turn a field's bad week around; draw rot's damp out of a granary; a touch of concentrated dawn that steadies the dying toward one more clear hour.
tree.cannot: Cannot cure — only comfort and buy time; the valley notices a golden field in a gray month, and asks.

abilities.name: Afterimage
abilities.narrationHints: Stepping out of your own lingering image — the eye holds where you were a breath too long.
abilities.description: Leave a hanging visual echo of yourself and be elsewhere when it fades.
abilities.notFor: Fooling echo-senses or dogs' noses; holding still (the trick IS the move); standing in darkness where no image can hang.

tree.name: Slip-Frame
tree.grants: One sidestep hidden behind your own afterimage — break a grab, dodge a swing, cross a doorway unmarked while eyes hold the ghost.
tree.cannot: One breath of hang-time; the ghost doesn't move or speak; bright even light needed.

tree.name: Double Walk
tree.grants: Your image walks three paces on while you turn a corner; two watchers argue later about where you went; in a scuffle, the first strike aimed at you hits yesterday's you.
tree.cannot: Once per scene per watcher — eyes learn; lantern-light makes thin ghosts.

tree.name: Crowd of One
tree.grants: Three afterimages peel off at a junction; a pursuit splits or stalls; walk out of an encirclement inside your own dissolving echo.
tree.cannot: Costs a real sprint's wind; Prism Sight r2+ reads every ghost instantly; you cannot ATTACK from inside the trick without ending it.

abilities.name: Clarity Lens
abilities.narrationHints: Air itself curved into a reading glass — the world's small print made legible.
abilities.description: Shape light into a floating lens: magnify, steady, and brighten fine detail.
abilities.notFor: Seeing through anything; distance (this is close-work, not a spyglass beyond r2); reading in true darkness.

tree.name: Jeweler's Air
tree.grants: A hovering lens for fine work — read worn engraving, find the hairline crack, tie the surgeon's knot; your craft checks on small things sharpen.
tree.cannot: Arm's-reach focus only; wobbles if you're winded; needs decent light.

tree.name: Far Glass
tree.grants: A spyglass of shaped air — read a banner across the valley floor, count a far ridge's walkers; steady enough to share with someone at your shoulder.
tree.cannot: Heat-shimmer and rain ruin it; watching far means blind near.

tree.name: The Patient Eye
tree.grants: A fixed lens that KEEPS watching — set it on a door and know later what crossed the light; pair with Glimmer Script to log what it saw in faint marks.
tree.cannot: One standing eye at a time; it is findable by anyone with light-craft; it records light only — no sound, no dark.

abilities.name: Glimmer Script
abilities.narrationHints: Writing with a fingertip of light — marks that sleep invisible until the right glow wakes them.
abilities.description: Write in persistent light: notes, marks, and signs only the keyed light reveals.
abilities.notFor: Long documents (a paragraph is a labor); marks on living skin; anything meant to survive a season of weather.

tree.name: Fingerlight
tree.grants: A sentence on stone, wood, or cloth that glows to YOUR light and sleeps otherwise; trail-marks a stranger walks past blind.
tree.cannot: Fades in days outdoors; any Radiant-trained eye can find it if they look; you can't erase another's script.

tree.name: Keyed Hand
tree.grants: Marks keyed to a specific person's light or a time of day; a week's persistence; a door-sign that flares warning only to your circle.
tree.cannot: The key travels by teaching, not by wish; a determined prism-reader breaks it with an hour's work.

tree.name: Standing Word
tree.grants: A month's persistence; script that changes with the light's angle (two messages in one mark); leave word in the Archive's dark that only your companion's glow will ever raise.
tree.cannot: Each standing word is a thread of your own light budget until it fades; the Guardian considers unsanctioned Archive-script a personal insult.

abilities.name: Beacon Thread
abilities.narrationHints: A hair-thin line of light from you to a chosen eye — a private star to steer by.
abilities.description: Spin a light-line between you and chosen companions: guide, signal, find.
abilities.notFor: Unwilling targets; carrying words (it carries direction and simple pulses only); threading through solid ground.

tree.name: Hearth-Line
tree.grants: One companion sees a faint thread pointing to you across a mile of open valley; three pulse-signals (come, wait, danger).
tree.cannot: Line of sight bends around hills poorly; the thread dies at running water; strangers with light-craft can glimpse it.

tree.name: Woven Watch
tree.grants: Three companions threaded at once; threads persist through a night; a snapped thread (member fallen or taken) is felt by all instantly.
tree.cannot: The weave frays past a few miles; in the Disputed Zone, interference gnaws threads within the hour.

tree.name: Constellation
tree.grants: A party moves as fixed stars to each other — night operations without a lantern shown; thread a stranger IN for one scene by shared consent; the snap-alarm wakes sleepers.
tree.cannot: You are the loom — if YOU fall, every thread dies at once; a woven night costs you dawn-headache and dimmed light-craft till noon.

abilities.name: Dawn Surgery
abilities.narrationHints: A blade of light finer than any steel, cauterizing as it parts — medicine at the edge of what the field permits.
abilities.description: Operate with focused light: clean cuts, sealed vessels, sight into the wound.
abilities.notFor: Battlefield speed (this is slow, prepared work); curing sickness (it is a knife, not a physic); working on yourself beyond a forearm's reach.

tree.name: Sealing Touch
tree.grants: Close a bleeding wound clean with light-cautery; lance and purge infection with far less scarring; steady work in a dim room by your own operating glow.
tree.cannot: Pain is NOT removed — someone must hold them; deep wounds still need a real medic's knowledge (yours or a helper's).

tree.name: The Fine Blade
tree.grants: Remove what must come out — a barbed head, a crushed splinter, a growth near the skin — with a surgeon's precision your hands alone never had.
tree.cannot: An hour's work costs you like a day's labor; the patient's stillness is a hard requirement (see: someone with Harmonic Voice).

tree.name: Light in the Wound
tree.grants: See INTO tissue as you work (paired shallow prism-read); operate at the edge of the impossible — the crushed hand rebuilt to work again, the eye saved; teach a valley medic to assist and double their craft for the scene.
tree.cannot: The field itself resists deep intervention near heart and head — some doors the light will not cut through, and pushing them is novel-use with real backlash.

abilities.name: Prism Ward
abilities.narrationHints: A lattice of faint light strung across a threshold — anything that crosses is written in color on your mind.
abilities.description: String a standing lattice that reports whatever crosses it.
abilities.notFor: Stopping anything outright (it slows and dazzles; it is not a wall — that is Sun-Seal's work); warding in bright noon (the lattice drowns); more thresholds than you can hold.

tree.name: Threshold Eye
tree.grants: One doorway or path warded till dawn — you know THAT something crossed and how big; the lattice is near-invisible in dusk or dark.
tree.cannot: Reports only at your next quiet moment unless you hold vigil; a light-crafter who SEES it can step through a made gap.

tree.name: Woven Rooms
tree.grants: Three wards held; crossing reports arrive as a felt color instantly at any distance in the valley; the ward reads direction and count.
tree.cannot: Running water and Zone interference eat wards in hours; your sleep is thinner for each ward held.

tree.name: The Bright Fence
tree.grants: Ward a compound for a season with anchored vessels (Light Well pairing); identity-echo on crossings you've threaded before (Beacon pairing); the fence can be keyed to IGNORE your circle. And the lattice thickens: a crossing meets real glare and resistance — enough to slow a body, foul an aim, and buy the moment the alarm was for.
tree.cannot: A season-fence is community work — the village will know and must consent; Precursor movers leave no color at all, and THAT absence is its own cold report.

abilities.name: Sun-Seal
abilities.narrationHints: A sigil of stored daylight that answers the dark.
abilities.description: Inscribe a ward of light — holds back shadow-things, illuminates on intrusion, a beacon that guards.
abilities.notFor: Warding physical force; permanence without upkeep.

tree.name: Sun-Seal
tree.grants: Ward a place against dark-drawn things; reveal any intrusion in light.
tree.cannot: Needs periodic re-lighting; physical foes ignore it.

tree.name: The Deeper Seal
tree.grants: Seal a door, a vessel, a wound with worked light — it does not open to anything without the seal's word.
tree.cannot: A seal is only as good as who holds its word. Light-seals are famously stolen.

tree.name: The Seal That Holds
tree.grants: A seal nothing breaks by force — it must be opened by right, not by strength.
tree.cannot: Sealed by right means someone with the right can always open it. There is no seal against the rightful.

abilities.name: Light-Borne
abilities.narrationHints: Made briefly of your own held light, you rise — and for a while the ground is a suggestion.
abilities.description: True flight, radiant: become light-buoyant and fly under control for a sustained interval — hover, rise, cross open sky. Blazingly visible (you ARE a light), so no stealth, but the sky is yours.
abilities.notFor: Stealth (you're a beacon); night-hiding; indefinite flight.

tree.name: Light-Borne
tree.grants: Fly under full control for a sustained interval — hover, climb, cross the open air. And you are a light aloft: from height you show the ground to everyone under it, which reveals a camp, a route, or a hidden company as surely as any lantern — including yours.
tree.cannot: You shine — seen for miles, no concealment; the interval ends and you must be down or near it; costly.
